verse_text: "Hear my prayer, O Lord, And give ear to my supplication; Do not be silent at my tears, For I am a sojourner before You, And a stranger, as were all my fathers.

links.context: Pilgrims, or "sojourners," are aliens, those who stay for a while in a strange place with no intention of permanently residing there. This is said of God's people in this world (see 2:11; [[GEN.23:4]]; [[PSA.38:13]]; [[HEB.11:13]]), for they are citizens of the heavenly world to come ([[PHP.3:20]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
